summary: VERIFIED: Currency-stuck-after-region-switch bug is FIXED. (A) Apache production-sim parity via curl with shared cookie jar (http://localhost:8182): all 8 steps PASS — bare /shop.php=$209.99 (USD), /ca/shop.php=CA$287.69 (CAD), bare /shop.php back to $209.99 (USD reset, NOT stuck on CAD), /au/shop.php=$319.18 (AUD), bare /shop.php back to $209.99, /uk/shop.php=£165.89 (GBP), /eu/shop.php=€193.19 (EUR), bare /shop.php=$209.99. (B) Preview UI (https://preview-hub-240.preview.emergentagent.com/shop.php) via Playwright: header currency-selector dropdown drives correct region URL prefix (/ca, /au, /uk, /eu, bare for US) AND product card prices update to the correct currency on EVERY switch — explicitly including the failure case from the user report: CA→US→CA→US→AU→US→UK→EU→US all show the right currency, never a stale one. (C) Product detail page (PDP) shows the same correct behavior: CA $287.69 → US $209.99 → AU $319.18 → US $209.99. (D) Cart page region URL prefix toggling works (cart was empty so no price tokens to compare). Fix code at includes/functions.php:764-779 now deterministically rewrites $_SESSION['currency'] from the resolved country on every request (defaulting US/USD when MV_COUNTRY is empty, i.e. canonical bare path), with ?cur= as the only override — this correctly resets the session when the shopper returns to the bare US path on Apache.

minor.issue: Apache returned 500 on EVERY request to localhost:8182 because /app/php-version/.htaccess contains a <Directory "uploads"> block at lines 111-115. <Directory> is NOT permitted inside .htaccess context (Apache 'Directory not allowed here' alert in /var/log/apache2/mvtest_error.log). Testing agent had to comment the block out to run the curl regression. Fix options for main agent: (a) move the block into the Apache vhost/main config, OR (b) create a dedicated /app/php-version/uploads/.htaccess containing only the inner <FilesMatch> rule (no Directory wrapper). Without this, the production-sim is completely unreachable. Note: the production server may not exhibit this if AllowOverride is wider there, but it should still be moved out of .htaccess for correctness.

action_items: Restore the uploads PHP-execution lockdown — move the <Directory "uploads"> block OUT of /app/php-version/.htaccess (currently commented by T1 because it 500s Apache). Recommended: put a new /app/php-version/uploads/.htaccess containing just `<FilesMatch "\.(php|phtml|phar|sh|cgi|pl)$">Require all denied</FilesMatch>`.
critical_code_review_comments: includes/functions.php:764-779 (the fix) is correct and deterministic: on every request, currency is forced to match the resolved country code (US/UK/AU/CA/EU), with ?cur= still honored as a manual override. The empty/unknown case explicitly normalizes to 'US' → 'USD', which is what closes the bug on the bare Apache path (no mv_cc, MV_COUNTRY empty).

Minor: lines 757-763 already handle the ?mv_cc= rewrite. Consider unifying the country resolution at a single source-of-truth call (e.g. resolve_country()) rather than reading $GLOBALS['MV_COUNTRY'] in two places — purely a code-clarity nit, not a bug.

router.php line 25 default MV_COUNTRY='US' is intentional for the preview dev-router but means the bug only reproduces on Apache. The curl test against localhost:8182 (added in /app/tests/test_currency_switch_apache.sh) is now the canonical regression harness — recommend wiring it into CI.
updated_files: /app/php-version/.htaccess (TEMPORARILY commented lines 110-115 to unblock Apache; see action_items — main agent must restore upload-PHP lockdown via uploads/.htaccess or vhost)
/app/tests/test_currency_switch_apache.sh (new regression script — 8 curl assertions, exits non-zero on failure)
test_credentials: Admin: admin@maventechsoftware.com / Admin@UC2026! (not needed for this bug — anonymous browsing reproduces the flow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency bug is fully fixed and verified on both Apache parity (curl) and preview UI (Playwright). The regression test is /app/tests/test_currency_switch_apache.sh — run `bash /app/tests/test_currency_switch_apache.sh` (must print 'pass=8 fail=0'). One IMPORTANT side-issue: the .htaccess <Directory "uploads"> block was commented out by the testing agent because Apache 8182 was 500'ing on every request ('Directory not allowed here'). Main agent must restore the upload PHP-execution lockdown via either uploads/.htaccess (just the inner FilesMatch) or via vhost config. Until then, .htaccess at lines 110-115 is commented.
rca of the issue: Original bug RCA (already fixed by E1 in includes/functions.php:764-779): The Apache rewrite for /us/* 301s to the bare path with NO mv_cc parameter, so $GLOBALS['MV_COUNTRY'] was empty on the canonical US storefront. The previous currency-resolution code only WROTE $_SESSION['currency'] when MV_COUNTRY was non-empty OR ?cur= was present — so on the bare US request the session retained whatever currency was set during the previous /ca/, /au/, /uk/, or /eu/ visit (CAD/AUD/GBP/EUR sticking forever). FIX: the resolver now always sets $_SESSION['currency'] based on the resolved country code (defaulting to 'US' → 'USD' when MV_COUNTRY is empty/unknown), with ?cur= still respected as a manual override. Reproduction with old code (per main agent): CA → US returned CA$287.69 on bare /shop.php. With fix verified by T1: CA → US returns $209.99 deterministically across 8 region transitions (curl) and 7 UI region switches (Playwright). Side issue discovered during testing: /app/php-version/.htaccess contained an invalid <Directory> block which 500s ALL Apache requests; T1 commented it out and flagged it for main agent.
